meta.site_description: On-demand TF2 server reservations for competitive Team Fortress 2. Pre-loaded RGL and ETF2L configs, multiple global locations.

home.title: Reserve a TF2 Server — {site_name}
home.description: Reserve a private Team Fortress 2 server for competitive play. Pre-loaded RGL and ETF2L configs, {count} locations worldwide.
home.heading: Reserve a server
home.beta_notice: Currently invite-only. Join our Discord for access.
home.instant_tooltip: A server is already running — no wait time
home.sdr_tooltip: Valve SDR available — lower latency via Steam's relay network
home.not_configured: Server provisioning is not configured. Add a cloud provider API key to enable reservations.
home.direct_connect_hint: Exposes the server IP, which may increase DDoS risk
home.reservation_duration: Reservations last {max_hours} hours. Servers auto-end when empty for {auto_end_minutes} minutes.
home.network_error: Network error — check your connection and try again.

status.title: Reservation #{number} - {site_name}
status.heading: Reservation #{number}
status.provision_error: An error occurred during provisioning. Please try again.
status.restart_confirm: Restart the server? This will disconnect players.
status.config_unavailable: Config list unavailable. Use !config in-game to see available configs.
status.players_stale: Live player stats are delayed. Last update {age}

about.title: About - {site_name}
about.description: Learn about {site_name} — how reservations work, in-game commands, server configs, and ban policies.
about.heading: About
about.what_is_body: {site_name} lets you instantly reserve a private Team Fortress 2 server. Pick a location, choose a map, and a server is spun up for you. Reservations last {max_hours} hours and auto-end when the server is empty for {auto_end_minutes} minutes.
about.commands_intro: Use these in chat during your reservation. Owner-only commands require the reservation owner to run them.
about.cmd_reservation: Shows the reservation number, owner, and time remaining.
about.cmd_end: Starts a 30-second countdown to end the reservation.
about.cmd_cancel: Cancels an active end countdown if it was started by mistake.
about.cmd_changemap: Changes the server to the specified map. If the map isn't installed on the server, it will be downloaded automatically.
about.cmd_config: Loads a league config on the server. Use without arguments to open a menu with available options (RGL, ETF2L, FBTF, or reset to defaults), or specify a config name directly.
about.cmd_restart: Opens a menu to restart the tournament, game, or round.
about.cmd_sdr: Re-connect to the server using SDR.
about.open_source_body: This project is open source, licensed under the GNU Affero General Public License v3 (AGPL-3.0), and available on
about.bans_body_1: If you abuse the service, you will be permanently banned. The
about.bans_body_2: also apply to reserved servers. You can view the full list of banned players on the

profile.title: Profile — {site_name}
profile.banned_message: You are banned from making reservations.
profile.export_description: Download a copy of all personal data we hold about you, including your profile, reservation history, and Steam trust data.
profile.delete_description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
profile.ban_persists: Your ban will remain in effect.
profile.delete_confirm: Are you sure? This is permanent.

my_reservations.title: My Reservations - {site_name}
my_reservations.heading: My Reservations
my_reservations.no_reservations: You haven't made any reservations yet.

ping.title: Ping Test - {site_name}
ping.description: Test your latency to all {site_name} server locations. Find the lowest-ping TF2 server near you.
ping.heading: Ping Test
ping.intro: Testing the latency from your browser to each server location. Lower is better.
ping.share_description: Anonymously share your ping results. Your approximate city/country is recorded — no IP is stored.
ping.share_thanks: Thanks! Your results have been recorded.
ping.results_note: Results depend on your network conditions and may vary between tests.

stats.title: Stats - {site_name}
stats.description: Server reservation statistics and community latency data for {site_name} — usage trends, location breakdowns, and ping results.
stats.heading: Statistics
stats.contribute: Run a {link_start}ping test{link_end} and share your results to contribute.
stats.submissions_description: Anonymous ping results shared by users via the {link_start}ping test{link_end} page.

maps.title: Maps - {site_name}
maps.description: Download custom and updated Team Fortress 2 maps used on {site_name} servers.
maps.heading: Custom Maps
maps.intro: Download the maps used on our servers. These are custom or updated versions that don't ship with TF2.

bans.title: Bans - {site_name}
bans.description: List of banned players on {site_name}. Abuse of the TF2 server reservation service results in a permanent ban.
bans.heading: Bans

errors.banned: You are banned from creating reservations.
errors.existing_reservation: You already have an active reservation (#{number})
errors.invalid_map: Invalid map '{map}'. Choose from the available map list.
errors.captcha_failed: Captcha verification failed. Please try again.
errors.not_configured: Server provisioning not configured. Please configure a cloud provider API key.
errors.config_not_available: Config not available on this server. Use !config in-game to see available configs.
errors.login_required: Please log in to view your reservations.
errors.provision_failed: Provisioning failed after {attempts} attempts. Please try creating a new reservation.
errors.rate_limit_exceeded: Rate limit exceeded. You can create {limit} reservations per hour (failed reservations count {multiplier}×). Please try again later.
errors.daily_limit_exceeded: Daily limit exceeded. You can create {limit} reservations per day. Please try again tomorrow.
errors.site_capacity: Server capacity reached ({current}/{max} slots in use). Please wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.sitewide_hourly: Site-wide hourly limit reached ({current}/{max}). Please try again later.
errors.sitewide_daily: Site-wide daily limit reached ({current}/{max}). Please try again later.
errors.circuit_breaker: Server provisioning is temporarily paused due to repeated failures ({count} in the last {window} minutes). Please try again in ~{minutes} minutes.
errors.daily_hours_exceeded: Daily hours limit exceeded. You've used {used} of {limit} hours today. Servers auto-end when empty, so ending unused reservations frees up your budget.
errors.steam_account_age: Your Steam account is {age} days old. Minimum required: {min} days.
errors.tf2_hours_private: We couldn't read your TF2 hours from Steam (often due to private game details). Make your Steam profile and game details public, then try again.
errors.tf2_hours_insufficient: You have {hours} hours in TF2. Minimum required: {min} hours.
errors.tf2_ownership_private: We couldn't verify TF2 ownership from Steam (often due to private game details). Make your Steam profile and game details public, then try again.
errors.tf2_ownership_required: You must own Team Fortress 2 to create reservations.
errors.vac_banned: Users with VAC bans cannot create reservations.
errors.profile_not_public: Your Steam profile must be public to create reservations.

motd.not_available: This reservation is not currently active.
